title: Profile audit record (v1)
description: One record per `episteme profile audit` run. Appended to ~/.episteme/memory/reflective/profile_audit.jsonl — never overwritten, never auto-mutated, never modified outside an explicit operator ack. Produced by src/episteme/_profile_audit.py::run_audit. Spec: docs/DESIGN_V0_11_PHASE_12.md.

version.description: Schema version. v1 axes are the 15 named in kernel/OPERATOR_PROFILE_SCHEMA.md section 4 (6 process + 9 cognitive-style).

run_id.description: Stable id of the audit run. Format audit-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-<4-hex>. Used by `episteme profile audit ack <run_id>` to mark a record as acknowledged.

run_ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the audit was run.

episodic_window.description: Rolling window over episodic records that this audit read (e.g. '30d'). See spec §Cold-start for why the default is 30d.

lexicon_fingerprint.description: First 16 hex chars of sha256 over the sorted canonicalized lexicon contents at run time. A change in any lexicon entry produces a different fingerprint — lexicon drift is visible in the record stream, never silent. See kernel/PHASE_12_LEXICON.md.

axes.description: Exactly 15 axis results — 6 process + 9 cognitive-style. Order matches kernel/OPERATOR_PROFILE_SCHEMA.md section 4.

acknowledged.description: Initially false. Flipped to true by `episteme profile audit ack <run_id>`. SessionStart surfacing only fires on unacknowledged records.

axis_name.description: One of the 15 axis names from kernel/OPERATOR_PROFILE_SCHEMA.md section 4.

claim.description: The value declared in core/memory/global/operator_profile.md — shape varies by axis (string / integer / list / object). Null when the profile declares no value (axis carries `confidence: default`).

verdict.description: aligned = all required signatures within claim's predicted range. drift = at least two signatures misaligned (D1 convergence) OR one catastrophic misalignment on a high-consequence axis. insufficient_evidence = under the axis's evidence_minimum; never flags.

evidence_count.description: Number of episodic records contributing to this axis's signatures for this run.

signatures.description: Observed signature values keyed by signature name (e.g. 'S1_failure_frame_ratio'). Empty when verdict is insufficient_evidence.

signature_predictions.description: Per-signature [low, high] range predicted by the declared claim. Empty when no claim is declared or verdict is insufficient_evidence.

confidence.description: Confidence in the verdict — function of evidence_count and signature convergence.

evidence_refs.description: correlation_ids of episodic records contributing to the signatures. Capped at 20 to keep the record readable; 'evidence_count' carries the true total.

suggested_reelicitation.description: Non-null only when verdict is 'drift'. A one-line prompt the operator can read at SessionStart (see core/hooks/session_context.py).
